本頁整合 Zolbetuximab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vyloy, in combination with fluoropyrimidine- and platinum-containing chemotherapy, is indicated for the first line treatment of adult patients with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic HER2...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（98.3%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（98.2%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（98.1%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（98.0%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（98.0%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（97.9%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（97.7%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（95.5%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（95.3%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（94.9%）</li>
<li>gastric adenocarcinoma and proximal polyposis of the stomach（94.8%）</li>
<li>microinvasive gastric cancer（94.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
